jobs.summary: Own product strategy and roadmap for one of DoorDash's core pillars (Merchant, Consumer, Operational Excellence, Ads, Logistics, or New Verticals), driving long-term vision and execution across cross-functional teams to shape the direction of the on-demand delivery platform. jobs.summary: Own the product strategy and roadmap for Asana's Project & Task Experience, delivering enterprise-grade features that balance complex customer use cases, compliance requirements, and product priorities.
